description.content: Manage tax profiles, exemptions, and overrides
Retrieves all configured tax profiles for the client.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Creates a new tax profile with custom bundles and overrides.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Retrieves configured tax exclusions.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Determine tax jurisdictions from addresses
Determines the tax jurisdiction for a given address using geocoding. Returns jurisdiction codes (PCode, FIPS) needed for tax calculations.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Look up service and transaction type information
Retrieves detailed jurisdiction information for a given PCode (proprietary jurisdiction code).
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Returns all valid transaction type and service type pairs that can be used for tax calculations.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Retrieves details for a specific tax type identifier.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Returns version and status information for the Communications API.
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Calculate communications taxes on transactions

item.name: Avalara Calculate Taxes on a Transaction

request.name: Avalara Calculate Taxes on a Transaction

description.content: Calculates communications taxes for one or more line items based on transaction type, service type, and jurisdiction information. Supports both individual and batch tax calculations.

response.name: Tax calculation results

description.content:
The Avalara Communications Tax API (AFC SaasPro) provides communications tax calculations for telecom, VoIP, internet, and other communications services. It supports tax calculations using transaction/service pairs, jurisdiction determination via geocoding, and customizable tax profiles for accurate communications tax compliance.

Contact Support:
 Name: Avalara Developer Relations
 Email: developer.relations@avalara.com
